tests.summary: The API service registration seeds direct browser API defaults.
tests.intent: Protect the DI setup that configures the ASP.NET Core wrapper for direct API mode.
tests.behavior: Calling AddOpenAIChatKitApi stores the configured API URL, domain key, and locale options.

tests.summary: The API service registration rejects direct API mode without a domain key.
tests.intent: Protect the DI setup from seeding an invalid direct ChatKit API configuration.
tests.behavior: Calling AddOpenAIChatKitApi without a domain key throws an argument-null exception.

tests.summary: The hosted service registration clears direct API defaults while preserving hosted configuration.
tests.intent: Protect the DI setup that switches consumers from direct API mode to hosted session mode.
tests.behavior: Calling AddOpenAIChatKitHosted resets the API URL and domain key while keeping the hosted session endpoint.

tests.summary: The ASP.NET Core endpoint adapter writes JSON responses for non-streaming ChatKit operations.
tests.intent: Protect the HTTP boundary for the translated ChatKit server surface.
tests.behavior: Posting a JSON ChatKit request returns a JSON payload with the expected thread data.

tests.summary: The assets tag helper emits each required asset only once per rendering context.
tests.intent: Protect the public Razor wrapper surface added to the ASP.NET Core package.
tests.behavior: CSS, package JS, and CDN JS are emitted on first render and suppressed on the second render in the same context.

tests.summary: The API host tag helper emits an error when the direct browser domain key is missing.
tests.intent: Protect the direct browser wrapper from serializing an invalid ChatKit API configuration.
tests.behavior: Direct browser API mode emits a render error instead of serializing a config payload when the domain key is missing.

tests.summary: The API host tag helper serializes a client tool handler lookup path in direct API mode.
tests.intent: Protect the client tool callback parity surface for the direct browser API mode wrapper.
tests.behavior: Setting client-tool-handlers on the API tag helper serializes the lookup path into the browser host config so the runtime can wire onClientTool.

tests.summary: The API host tag helper serializes composer options and upload strategy metadata into the browser config payload.
tests.intent: Protect the packaged API-mode projection for attachments, composer pickers, dictation, and upload strategy.
tests.behavior: Configured API-mode composer defaults and explicit upload strategy settings appear in the serialized host config.

tests.summary: The API host tag helper forwards the configured domain key in direct browser API mode.
tests.intent: Protect the direct browser ChatKit configuration surface exposed by the ASP.NET Core wrapper.
tests.behavior: Configured direct browser API defaults populate both the API URL and domain key in the serialized host config.

tests.summary: The generic ChatKit tag helper now requires an explicit mode choice.
tests.intent: Prevent ambiguous Razor configuration that silently switches between local and API-backed modes.
tests.behavior: Using the generic host tag helper emits a render error instead of inferring a mode.

tests.summary: The hosted host tag helper omits the action endpoint when widget forwarding is disabled.
tests.intent: Protect the explicit hosted Razor wrapper surface added to the ASP.NET Core package.
tests.behavior: Disabling widget forwarding removes the action endpoint from the serialized config.

tests.summary: The hosted host tag helper omits disclaimer settings when no disclaimer text is configured.
tests.intent: Preserve the upstream disclaimer contract, which requires text when disclaimer settings are sent.
tests.behavior: High-contrast defaults alone do not serialize a disclaimer object into the browser config.

tests.summary: The hosted host tag helper supports client-only widget callbacks without requiring a forwarding endpoint.
tests.intent: Protect the upstream widgets.onAction parity surface in hosted mode.
tests.behavior: Registering a widget action callback while disabling forwarding preserves the client handler and omits the action endpoint.

tests.summary: The hosted host tag helper serializes a client tool handler lookup path set directly on the tag helper.
tests.intent: Protect the client tool callback parity surface exposed by the ASP.NET Core Razor wrapper.
tests.behavior: Setting the client-tool-handlers attribute serializes the lookup path into the browser host config so the runtime can wire onClientTool.

tests.summary: The hosted host tag helper serializes both a client handler and endpoint forwarding when both are configured.
tests.intent: Protect the coexistence contract where client handling and server forwarding are both active.
tests.behavior: When a widget action handler and forward-widget-actions are both configured, both are emitted so the runtime can run client handling first, then forward to the endpoint.

tests.summary: The hosted host tag helper serializes configured UI options and explicit attributes into the browser config payload.
tests.intent: Protect the public Razor wrapper surface added to the ASP.NET Core package.
tests.behavior: Configured options and explicit hosted tag helper attributes appear in the serialized host config.

tests.summary: The hosted ChatKit tag helper serializes explicit hosted session and action endpoints into the browser config payload.
tests.intent: Protect the explicit OpenAI-hosted wrapper surface.
tests.behavior: The hosted host tag helper emits the provided session and action endpoints and omits custom API settings.

tests.summary: The hosted host tag helper propagates a default client tool handler lookup path from service options.
tests.intent: Protect the server-side options path that wires onClientTool without requiring per-page tag helper attributes.
tests.behavior: Configuring ClientToolHandlers in AddOpenAIChatKitHosted populates the browser host config with the lookup path.

tests.summary: Threads create requests stream the created thread and assistant response events through the ChatKit pipeline.
tests.intent: Protect the core thread routing path used by hosted ChatKit servers.
tests.behavior: Processing a threads.create payload produces stream events for thread creation and the completed assistant item.

tests.summary: Threads create requests serialize with the upstream ChatKit discriminator and payload field names.
tests.intent: Protect exact wire compatibility for the core request envelope.
tests.behavior: Serializing a threads.create request emits the expected type discriminator and content payload shape.

tests.summary: ChatKit conversation items map into the agent input shape expected by the agents dependency.
tests.intent: Protect interop between ChatKit message history and the shared agents runtime.
tests.behavior: Simple user and assistant items are translated into the corresponding agent conversation item types and text values.

tests.summary: Widget exports reject state that does not satisfy the exported JSON schema.
tests.intent: Protect schema-based input validation before widget rendering occurs.
tests.behavior: Rendering a widget with invalid input state fails before the Jinja template is hydrated into a widget root.

tests.summary: Widget exports load from disk or stream, preserve their metadata, and hydrate widget roots from valid input state.
tests.intent: Protect the file-backed widget template abstraction used by downstream ChatKit integrations.
tests.behavior: Loading a widget export from disk or stream preserves the template, schema, preview, and encoded payload, and building with valid state hydrates the preview widget.

tests.summary: Widget exports also load from streams and hydrate the widget preview using the same Jinja-backed pipeline.
tests.intent: Protect the stream-based widget definition API used by downstream integrations.
tests.behavior: Loading a widget export from a stream preserves the template, schema, preview, and encoded payload, and building with valid state hydrates the preview widget.

tests.summary: Streaming text widgets emit deltas instead of forcing a root replacement when text is appended.
tests.intent: Protect incremental widget updates for ChatKit streaming UI flows.
tests.behavior: Diffing compatible before and after widgets returns only the appended text delta and completion state.

tests.summary: The release versioning script can advance from a tagged commit when the working tree is dirty.
tests.intent: Protect release versioning for local release preparation on top of an already-tagged HEAD commit.
tests.behavior: When HEAD already has a release tag and tracked changes exist, the script continues instead of failing on the existing HEAD tag guard.

tests.summary: The release versioning script can preview the computed version without changing the repository.
tests.intent: Support a safe check for what the next release would be before committing to any release action.
tests.behavior: When calculate-only mode is used, the script reports the computed bump and exits before validation or repo mutation.

tests.summary: The release versioning script can honor a manual minor bump override when the public API diff looks breaking.
tests.intent: Protect the explicit bump override path for semver exceptions that are intentionally non-breaking.
tests.behavior: When the shipped API diff would normally require a major bump, the script respects -Bump Minor and the validator accepts it.

tests.summary: The upstream sync state helper bootstraps ChatKit-specific tracked and local state defaults.
tests.intent: Protect the repeatable initialization path for the upstream synchronization workflow.
tests.behavior: Initializing sync state emits ChatKit upstream metadata and creates both tracked and local state files when missing.

tests.summary: The upstream sync prompt builder carries the ChatKit translation constraints and trims oversized diff content.
tests.intent: Protect the Codex prompt contract used for automated upstream translation runs.
tests.behavior: Building a prompt includes the ChatKit guidance and notes content while truncating large diff excerpts.

tests.summary: The upstream sync metadata helpers produce ChatKit-specific branch, commit, and pull request text.
tests.intent: Protect predictable naming for automated sync branches and PRs.
tests.behavior: Generating sync metadata returns the expected ChatKit branch name, commit text, and commit summary body.
